run_metadata.coverage_summary: Live discovery on 2026-06-26 (Sydney) via WebSearch. Tier 1 swept across all nine jurisdictions (Commonwealth/AusTender, NSW eTendering/buy.nsw, Buying for Victoria, QTenders QLD + supply.qld.gov.au migration, Tenders WA, Tenders SA/Buying4SA, Tenders Tasmania, NT QTOL, ACT Tenders). Concrete open opportunities captured for NSW (three Transport for NSW civil/ICT works closing 6-15 Jul 2026), plus still-open carry-forwards for Commonwealth (Defence DSRG marketing RFT), NSW (Frank Partridge rest-area water; Far West LHD air transport) and SA (hydrogen release areas). Tier 2 (GBE/public sector) reviewed and recorded: Sydney Water (Strategic Customer Engagement Program 2026-2029 market sounding), Water Corporation WA (2026 Engineering Design Services panel early tender advice), Melbourne Water, plus Australia Post, NBN Co and Snowy Hydro supplier channels. Tier 3 (private sector) executed: SAP Ariba Discovery, BHP, Rio Tinto, Fortescue (Ariba/prequal), Woodside (Ariba) and Santos (Coupa) channels confirmed; their live opportunities are behind free supplier registration or invitation-only, so they are recorded as discovered_sources, not fabricated as tenders. CRITICAL LIMITATION: every buyer detail page tried (AusTender, buy.nsw, tenders.vic.gov.au) returned HTTP 403 to the fetch tool (bot protection), so all opportunity detail was reconstructed from buyer-originated search-result snippets only; no tender document could be opened this run.
gaps: All buyer-originated tender detail pages (tenders.gov.au, buy.nsw.gov.au, tenders.nsw.gov.au, tenders.vic.gov.au) returned HTTP 403 to WebFetch (bot/anti-scraping protection); detail therefore comes from buyer-originated search snippets only and could not be confirmed against the notices' own documents. Tender IDs, values, evaluation criteria and contacts remain unverified for every entry.

WA, QLD, TAS, NT and ACT Tier 1 portals confirmed live this run but no current opportunity with a concrete closing date could be extracted from snippets (TAS reported '2 new tenders in the last 7 days' but titles were not exposed in snippets; QLD is mid-migration to VendorPanel via supply.qld.gov.au).

Tier 3 corporate opportunities (SAP Ariba Discovery/SBN, BHP via Ariba+GCMS, Rio Tinto, Fortescue, Woodside via Ariba, Santos via Coupa) are registration-gated or invitation-only and not publicly scrapable; no authenticated supplier session is available, so portals are recorded but no corporate tender entries were fabricated. Management-consultancy RFPs (Accenture/KPMG/Deloitte) remain out of scope (invitation-only).
EstimateOne / construction subcontractor work-packages require a free trade account to view live package closing dates; platform remains recorded as a source, individual packages not captured.

The Far West LHD air-transport tender was originally surfaced via the GovMarket aggregator (discovery signal only); its buyer-originated NSW eTendering listing still could not be opened (403), so scope is snippet-derived and still needs buyer-source/document confirmation.

AusTender DEF8101 market-scan (closed 26-Jun), Tasmania Sandford Oval water (closed 26-Jun), Randwick High School fibre upgrade (closed 25-Jun) and VIC VRMC2026 (closed Dec-2025) were observed but dropped from the tenders array as their closing dates have passed; the Commonwealth GCCA communications RFT also appears in AusTender's CLOSED list and was excluded.
recommended_seed_additions: Water Corporation (WA) — Suppliers & contractors (https://www.watercorporation.com.au/about-us/suppliers-and-contractors); tenders run via SAP Ariba; 2026 Engineering Design Services (EDS) Panel early tender advice issued.
Buying4SA — Find opportunities (https://buying4.sa.gov.au/opportunities/find-opportunities); SA Government opportunities portal complementing tenders.sa.gov.au.
supply.qld.gov.au — Queensland Government Supplier Portal (VendorPanel); destination for the QTenders-to-VendorPanel migration.
Australia Post — Tendering & supply opportunities (https://auspost.com.au/about-us/tendering-supply-opportunities); GBE buyer.
NBN Co — Partners and suppliers (https://www.nbnco.com.au/corporate-information/about-nbn-co/suppliers); GBE using RFI/RFQ/RFP/RFT.
Snowy Hydro — Current tenders (procurement portal; renewable-energy and Snowy 2.0 procurement); GBE.
Fortescue Supplier Centre (https://fortescue.com/suppliers); corporate, SAP Ariba + prequalification, ICN/ePilbara local-supplier sourcing.
Woodside Energy — Suppliers (https://www.woodside.com/suppliers); corporate, SAP Ariba supplier portal.
Santos — Procurement & Supply Chain (https://www.santos.com/procurement/); corporate, Coupa supplier portal.
Melbourne Water — supplier/tender channel; VIC GBE (Field Civil Panel and engineering services panels).

tenders.title: Shoulder widening civil works — HW15 Barton Highway dual carriageway
tenders.description: Transport for NSW is seeking a contractor to undertake shoulder widening civil works on the HW15 Barton Highway dual carriageway.
tenders.eligibility: Open (publicly advertised RFT via NSW eTendering / buy.nsw).
tenders.detail_source: buy.nsw open opportunities search-result snippet (title and closing 06-Jul-2026 15:00); detail page returned HTTP 403.
tenders.reasoning: Found via buy.nsw / NSW eTendering open-tenders search for July 2026 closing dates; buyer-originated on the NSW Government procurement portal.
tenders.notes: Headline/snippet level only. Title and closing 06-Jul-2026 15:00 from the buy.nsw listing; the detail page could not be opened (HTTP 403), so RFT number, value, scope documents and contacts are unverified.

tenders.title: Slope stabilisation works — 2022 natural disaster sites 2 and 12, Moss Vale Road, Barrengarry Mountain
tenders.description: Transport for NSW is seeking a contractor to deliver slope stabilisation works at two 2022 natural-disaster sites (sites 2 and 12), located about 3km apart on Moss Vale Road, Barrengarry Mountain.
tenders.eligibility: Open (publicly advertised RFT via NSW eTendering / buy.nsw).
tenders.delivery_location: Moss Vale Road, Barrengarry Mountain, NSW
tenders.detail_source: buy.nsw open opportunities search-result snippet (title and closing 06-Jul-2026 15:00); detail page returned HTTP 403.
tenders.reasoning: Found via buy.nsw / NSW eTendering open-tenders search for July 2026 closing dates; buyer-originated on the NSW Government procurement portal.
tenders.notes: Headline/snippet level only. Title and closing 06-Jul-2026 15:00 from the buy.nsw listing; detail page not openable (HTTP 403), so RFT number, value, geotechnical scope and contacts are unverified.

tenders.title: Sydney Park Junction project — Stage 2 construction
tenders.description: Transport for NSW has invited tenders to undertake construction for Stage 2 of the Sydney Park Junction project on the Princes Highway, with work due to start in 2026.
tenders.eligibility: Open (publicly advertised RFT via NSW eTendering / buy.nsw).
tenders.delivery_location: Sydney Park Junction, Princes Highway, Sydney, NSW
tenders.detail_source: buy.nsw open opportunities snippet + Transport for NSW project page (sydney-park-junction) for context; tender detail page returned HTTP 403.
tenders.reasoning: Found via buy.nsw open-tenders search; cross-referenced against the Transport for NSW Sydney Park Junction project page. Buyer-originated on the NSW Government portal.
tenders.notes: Headline/snippet level only. Closing 15-Jul-2026 15:00 from the buy.nsw listing; project context from the TfNSW project page. Value, detailed scope and contacts unverified (detail page 403).

tenders.title: Frank Partridge Rest Area 2026–29 — Potable Water Supply
tenders.description: Supply of potable water to the Frank Partridge rest area for the 2026–2029 period.
tenders.detail_source: buy.nsw open opportunities snippet (closing 01-Jul-2026 15:00); detail page returned HTTP 403.
tenders.reasoning: Carried forward from the 2026-06-25 run; re-confirmed via buy.nsw open-tenders search as still open with closing 01-Jul-2026 15:00.
tenders.notes: Carry-forward, closing-soon. Detail page not openable (HTTP 403), so scope and contacts remain unverified. first_seen retained from the prior run.

tenders.title: Air Transport and Remote Health Services for Regional and Rural NSW (Far West LHD)
tenders.buyer: NSW Ministry of Health / Far West Local Health District
tenders.description: NSW Health is seeking a provider (or providers) to deliver air transport and a bundle of remote health services across regional and rural NSW, anchored in the Far West Local Health District.
tenders.deliverables_summary: Provision of inter-hospital patient transfers and fixed-wing transport for clinicians, plus delivery of remote/rural health services including medical primary health care clinics, remote oral health services, and drug and alcohol information and counselling services across the Far West Local Health District and regional/rural NSW.
key_deliverables: Inter-hospital patient transfers across regional and rural NSW
Fixed-wing transport for clinicians to provide health services in rural and remote communities
Medical primary health care clinics in Far West LHD
Remote oral health services in Far West LHD
Drug and alcohol information and counselling services in Far West LHD
tenders.eligibility: Open (publicly advertised RFT via NSW eTendering).
tenders.delivery_location: Far West Local Health District, regional and rural NSW
tenders.detail_source: Scope reconstructed from GovMarket aggregator listing snippet (discovery signal only); buyer-originated NSW eTendering page could not be opened (HTTP 403).
tenders.reasoning: Carried forward from the 2026-06-26 prior pass; originally discovered via a GovMarket aggregator listing used only as a discovery signal and recorded against the buyer-originated source (NSW eTendering / NSW Ministry of Health). Aggregator is NOT treated as the source of truth.
tenders.notes: Carry-forward, still open (closing 16-Jul-2026). Service scope is snippet-derived via an aggregator and still needs confirmation on the buyer's own NSW eTendering notice; RFT number, value and contacts unverified.

tenders.title: Graphic and Digital Marketing Services to support industry engagements
tenders.buyer: Department of Defence — Capability Acquisition and Sustainment Group (Industry Engagement Division), DSRG
tenders.description: Defence's Industry Engagement Division (Capability Acquisition and Sustainment Group) is seeking graphic and digital marketing services plus event-management support for virtual events, to support delivery of international trade events and promote Australian defence industry.
tenders.deliverables_summary: Provision of graphic design and digital marketing collateral together with event-management support for virtual/online events, used to deliver international trade events and promote the Australian defence industry to international and domestic audiences.
key_deliverables: Graphic design and digital marketing materials
Support for delivery of international trade events
tenders.eligibility: Open to all suppliers (publicly advertised RFT).
tenders.detail_source: AusTender Current ATM View snippet for ATM 80064 (search result); full ATM page and documents returned HTTP 403.
tenders.reasoning: Carried forward from the 2026-06-26 prior pass; re-confirmed via AusTender keyword search as still open (closing 29-Jun-2026). Buyer-originated on the Commonwealth AusTender portal.
tenders.notes: Carry-forward, closing-soon. Scope, closing time and delivery timeframe (08/07/2026) taken from the AusTender search snippet; the ATM detail page and any attached documents could not be opened (HTTP 403), so values, evaluation criteria and contact remain unverified.

tenders.source_name: Tenders SA / SA Department for Energy and Mining
tenders.title: Hydrogen & Renewable Energy Release Areas — Call for Tenders (Gawler Ranges East & Whyalla West)
tenders.buyer: SA Department for Energy and Mining
tenders.description: Competitive call for tenders over designated Hydrogen and Renewable Energy release areas (Gawler Ranges East and Whyalla West) under SA's Hydrogen and Renewable Energy Act framework.
tenders.eligibility: Open competitive call for the designated release areas.
tenders.delivery_location: Gawler Ranges East and Whyalla West, South Australia
tenders.reasoning: Carried forward from the 2026-06-25 run; closing 28-Jun-2026, still open this run.
tenders.notes: Carry-forward, closing-soon. Detail page not openable (HTTP 403); release-area boundaries, conditions and contacts unverified. first_seen retained from the prior run.

tenders.title: Strategic Customer Engagement Program 2026–2029 — market capability sounding
tenders.description: Sydney Water is seeking information on market capability and solutions to support its Strategic Customer Engagement Program for the 2026–2029 period (early market engagement ahead of procurement).
tenders.eligibility: Open market sounding; respondents register/lodge via Sydney Water's SAP Ariba and NSW eTendering channels.
tenders.submission_method: Via Sydney Water SAP Ariba / NSW eTendering (tenders.nsw.gov.au/sydneywater)
tenders.detail_source: Sydney Water current-tenders search-result snippet (market capability/solutions request); detail page not openable.
tenders.reasoning: Found via a Tier 2 GBE sweep of Sydney Water; buyer-originated on Sydney Water's current-tenders page and mirrored on NSW eTendering.
tenders.notes: Headline/snippet level only; recorded as an early-market-engagement / market sounding. Closing date, exact scope and contacts not published in the snippet and unverified (no document opened).

tenders.title: 2026 Engineering Design Services (EDS) Panel — early tender advice
tenders.description: Water Corporation (WA) has issued early tender advice to the engineering consulting market regarding the upcoming procurement of its 2026 Engineering Design Services (EDS) Panel.
tenders.eligibility: Engineering consulting market; respondents engage via Water Corporation's SAP Ariba e-procurement system.
tenders.submission_method: Via Water Corporation SAP Ariba e-procurement; advertised on Tenders WA
tenders.detail_source: Water Corporation suppliers/major-capital-works search-result snippet (early tender advice for 2026 EDS Panel).
tenders.reasoning: Found via a Tier 2 GBE sweep of WA water utilities; buyer-originated on Water Corporation's suppliers/major-capital-works pages, with formal tenders run via SAP Ariba and advertised on Tenders WA.
tenders.notes: Early tender advice / market sounding for an upcoming panel — captured at headline level. Formal RFT, closing date and full scope not yet published; Ariba registration required to participate. Unverified beyond the snippet.

discovered_sources.notes: Listing rows readable via search snippets; both buy.nsw and the legacy tenders.nsw.gov.au RSS/detail pages returned HTTP 403 to the fetch tool.

discovered_sources.how_discovered: Canonical seed; central WA public-sector RFT portal (Main Roads WA, Water Corporation, regional commissions).
